title: Fossils And Archeology: (Advancement Plaques)
description: This resource pack makes the Advancement plaques base texture like a fossil.
body:
This resource pack transforms the base texture of advancement plaques to resemble fossils embedded in stone. This small visual change adds a surprising amount of atmosphere, especially for people who enjoy playing alongside with [ Fossils And Archeology](https://modrinth.com/mod/fossils-and-archeology-revival).

Requires [Advancement Plaques](https://modrinth.com/mod/advancement-plaques) to function.![fossil texct](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12ad46d1da037de506885f525eff4b08b8589cd9.png)
